feature_set: all (sent+macro+tech). NLP head: jhartmann-only (winner of V4 nlp_combo_ablation on S1 — port Sharpe +1.38, return +183%, alpha vs BH +193 pp)
horizon_source: train-only Spearman IC on equal-weighted combined sentiment (leakage fix #1)
label_source: train-only quantile 30/70 of forward log-return (no leakage)
threshold_source: val Sharpe on 5x5 grid of (buy_th, sell_th) in [0.30..0.50] (leakage fix #2)
